DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SHORTER, AARON

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-09-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-15-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS SHORTER, ANRON TO BE SHORTER, AARON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHORTER, AARON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH ST.#315,SF,CA. $915.58 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $995.58, STAYED UNTIL MAR-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED

DEPT. 5, JUDGE ORR, CSR S. NAYLOR, CLERK, E.MONTI 2:48PM. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF COUNSEL, ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT FOR THE PLTF. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. BOTH PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING STIPULATION: PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMEHNT FOR POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 106 SIXTH ST, #315. LEASE FORFEITED. DAMAGES WAIVED. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMED BUT STAYED TO 3-1-94,5PM. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, THEN PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR $915.58 PLUS $80.00 COSTS. BOTH PARTIES WAIVE ANY OTHER CLAIMS. ANY PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED. NO OTHER OCCUPANTS AT PREMISES. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $12.14. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHORTER, AARON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SHORTER, AARON
